# Fastmvc Db Models

Shared SQLAlchemy ORM models for FastMVC apps (user/auth, payments, conversations, webhooks, etc.)

## Install

```bash
pip install fastmvc-db-models
```

Editable (development):

```bash
pip install -e .
```

## Repository

`https://github.com/shregar1/fastmvc-db-models`

## Tooling

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md), [Makefile](Makefile), and [PUBLISHING.md](PUBLISHING.md).
